_note: Catalog harvested LIVE 2026-06-10 (docs/phase-3/portal-research/uct.md 'Live spike findings'). selector = the stable PeopleSoft element id; labels are the accessible names (approach C works on Fluid, ids are the deterministic fallback). university_id is resolved at wiring time from the universities row (seeded ids are uuid4 — see adapters/__init__.slug_for_website). `manual` fields are driven by dedicated adapter flows (account creation, school search, subject loop, programme cascade, redress block, uploads), not the generic filler. Steps 7 and 9 have no fields (Save only).

fields.label: First Name (as per SA ID/Passport)
fields.help_text: account creation; prefills into Step 2 read-back

fields.label: Date of Birth (dd/mm/yyyy)
fields.help_text: typed dd/mm/yyyy works — no calendar widget needed; cross-validated against the SA ID

fields.label: South African National ID / International Passport Number
Email Address
fields.help_text: NO accessible name (label is a detached sibling) — must use the id; repeat field #SCC_NUR_WRK_EMAIL_ADDR$10$

fields.label: OTP (emailed, valid 15 minutes)
fields.help_text: iframe modal 'Confirm Email Address' after Create; answered via EmailChallengeSource (relay or imap); account-creation only — no OTP at login

fields.label: Title
fields.help_text: selector id [VERIFY] — step-2 ids beyond the catalogued ones follow the UCT_OA_PERS_ prefix

fields.label: Preferred Name
fields.help_text: prints on the student card — ask the student

fields.label: Sex
fields.help_text: Trans verified live (research said F/M only)

fields.label: Home Language
fields.help_text: large native list (Afrikaans … Yugoslav); title-case entries like 'English', 'Isizulu'

fields.label: Indicate Type of Citizenship or Residency in SA
fields.help_text: selecting 'SA Citizen' reveals the conditional SA ID Number field

fields.label: Race (Self-Declared)
fields.help_text: an AJAX re-render (e.g. after citizenship) can silently revert this — re-assert after round-trips

fields.label: SA ID Number
fields.help_text: appears after citizenship_type='SA Citizen'; auto-formats '080312 4001 089'; checksum + DOB cross-validated

fields.label: Do you need assistance because of a disability?
Postal Code
fields.help_text: typing the code + Tab populates the Suburb dropdown directly — the Lookup modal is optional

fields.label: Suburb/Town/City
fields.help_text: options populate (UPPERCASE) after the postal code is entered

fields.label: My postal address is the same as my home address
fields.help_text: switch, default ON

fields.label: Contact Numbers (add-row modal: Phone Type + Telephone)
fields.help_text: '+' opens an iframe modal: Phone Type 'SA Cellular' auto-sets country code 027; Telephone placeholder 0820000000; modal Save

fields.label: Parent/Guardian SA ID Number / Passport Information
fields.help_text: required once any P/G detail is entered (error 21000, 2756); Luhn-validated for SA IDs

fields.label: Is the parent/guardian listed above also your fee payer?
fields.help_text: checking it hides the fee-payer dropdown (#UCT_OA_PARENT_UCT_FEE_PAYER: Guardian / Other / Parent / Self)

fields.label: Year completing/completed secondary schooling examination
fields.help_text: drives the qualification list (NSC option only appears for recent years)

fields.label: Indicate whether your school has 3 or 4 terms per year
School leaving qualification or examination authority
fields.help_text: year-dependent options; the school-selection re-render RESETS this — re-assert after picking the school

fields.label: Grade 12 school (Find School modal: Province + name, >=4 letters)
fields.help_text: iframe modal: Province select + Search Name -> result rows; 'School not found' switch enables manual entry

fields.label: School subjects (Grade 11 final % + Grade 12 April %)
fields.help_text: SLOT-SEMANTIC grid rows (#UCT_SCHLCRSE_H1$0_row_N for Gr11, H11 for Gr12): row 0 = Home Language only, row 1 = HL/1st-Additional languages, row 2 = Maths variants, row 3 = Life Orientation only, rows 4+ = full ~160-entry elective list. Names abbreviated ('Afrikaans 1st Additional Lang') -> fuzzy match. Each row opens an iframe modal (Subject select + % inputs; confirm #UCT_DERIVED_ONL_CONFIRM_PB). Grade 12 auto-copies Gr11 subjects; modal wants *April Results % (#UCT_OA_COURSES_CRSE_GRADE_INPUT1, required) + June % (INPUT2, optional).

fields.label: Have you ever applied to UCT before?
Level of Qualification (first choice)
fields.help_text: cascade: level -> Faculty (#UCT_OA_CHOICE_ACAD_GROUP) -> Academic Qualification (#UCT_OA_CHOICE_ACAD_PROG) -> Specialisation (#UCT_OA_CHOICE_ACAD_PLAN); choice 2 mirrors with _INC-suffixed ids. NOTE 'Undergrad Health Sciences' is a separate level.

fields.label: Academic Qualification (first choice)
fields.help_text: free-text programme resolved against the live faculty->qualification cascade by the adapter; no eligibility gating at selection (unlike UP/UJ)

fields.label: NBT Registration Number
fields.help_text: MUST start '931' (error 21000, 2835); student-supplied (NBT out of automation scope) — hard precondition for a UCT run

fields.label: NBT Exam Date
fields.help_text: dropdown of actual NBT sitting dates (dd/mm/yy), revealed after the year is selected

fields.label: Have you received NSFAS funding from another Institution?
Do you need financial assistance for this programme?
Do you wish to be considered for student housing?
What was your mother's racial classification under apartheid?
options: My parents did not reside in SA during apartheid

fields.label: What was your father's racial classification under apartheid?
options: My parents did not reside in SA during apartheid

fields.label: What is/was your mother's first language?
Highest level of education of your mother/female guardian
options: Technical College certificate, trade certificate or similar
University or Technikon certificate or diploma

fields.label: Highest level of education of your father/male guardian
options: Technical College certificate, trade certificate or similar
University or Technikon certificate or diploma

fields.label: The highest level of education by any grandparent
options: Technical College certificate, trade certificate or similar
University or Technikon certificate or diploma

fields.label: Does/did your family receive a child-support grant on your behalf?
Does/did your family rely on a social pension from the State?
SA Identity Document upload (required, Choice Number = All)
fields.help_text: Upload button -> File Attachment iframe -> My Device (native file chooser) -> Upload -> 'Upload Complete' -> Done. Permitted: .doc .docx .htm .jpeg .jpg .odt .pdf .rtf .tif .xls .xlsx
